overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from a video game (Watch Dogs: Legion) showing a character walking along a rainy London waterfront promenade at night. The character passes beneath a blue-lit pedestrian bridge resembling the Millennium Bridge, continues along the wet cobblestone path past modern buildings and digital billboards, and ascends a wide stone staircase to an upper terrace.

events.description: character begins jogging briefly then returns to walking

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet cobblestone path toward the illuminated bridge, passing digital billboards

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking in same direction ahead, wearing light-colored clothing

entered.detail: modern pedestrian bridge with distinctive blue LED lighting along its cables and deck
tall digital advertising screen displaying yellow and black promotional content
contemporary glass and steel office building with illuminated windows
metal safety railing along the river edge

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a rain-slicked cobblestone promenade at night, approaching a striking blue-lit pedestrian bridge. Digital billboards illuminate the right side while the river is visible beyond the railing on the left. Sparse pedestrians walk in the opposite direction as the character moves steadily forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway beneath pedestrian bridge transitioning to open promenade

events.description: character walks beneath the blue-lit bridge structure, entering a partially covered area
exiting the bridge cover, returning to open sky with direct street lighting

agents.ego_description: passing beneath the blue-lit bridge and continuing along the waterfront, navigating around other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking and standing near the riverside railing

entered.detail: large concrete and steel support pillar for the pedestrian bridge
exterior staircase with red lighting leading up to building entrance
large red and white striped umbrella marking an outdoor seating area or food stall
historic stone archway structure at the top of the upcoming stairs

segments.scene_description: The character passes beneath the dramatic blue-lit bridge structure, temporarily sheltered from the rain. The environment transitions from covered walkway back to open promenade, passing a red-and-white striped umbrella and approaching a stone archway. Other pedestrians populate the riverside path, and the city skyline glows across the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: monumental stone staircase leading to upper terrace

events.description: character begins ascending the wide stone staircase to upper level

agents.ego_description: climbing the wide stone stairs toward the upper terrace, passing a worker in a blue jacket

notable_agents.action: worker in blue high-visibility jacket bending over near the top of the stairs

entered.detail: broad stone staircase with multiple steps leading up to terrace level
small yellow illuminated markers lining the edge of the staircase
red plastic construction barriers blocking off upper area

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a wide stone staircase illuminated by yellow marker lights, leaving the riverside path below. A worker in a blue jacket is visible near the top, and red construction barriers block part of the upper terrace. The blue bridge and river disappear from view as the character climbs to the higher elevation.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rain-slicked London waterfront that transitions from a neon-lit promenade to an elevated urban terrace. It begins with the character walking along a cobblestone path flanked by digital billboards and the river, moving steadily toward a striking blue-lit pedestrian bridge. As the character passes beneath the dramatic blue structure, the environment shifts from the open rain to a sheltered walkway before emerging again past a red-and-white striped umbrella and a stone archway. The scene then turns away from the glowing city skyline as the character ascends a wide stone staircase illuminated by yellow marker lights. Finally, the blue bridge and river disappear from view as the camera climbs toward an upper terrace marked by red construction barriers and a worker in a blue jacket.
